# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: web-application
description: A Helm chart for the web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"
---
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: your-registry/web-application
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "latest"

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

database:
  host: postgres
  port: 5432
  name: appdb
  username: ""
  password: ""

resources: {}

ingress:
  enabled: false
  className: ""
  annotations: {}
  hosts:
    - host: web-application.local
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: Prefix
  tls: []

env: []

nodeSelector: {}

tolerations: []

affinity: []
